response.justification: While the candidate has strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor’s thesis work and outdated NI LabWindows roles, insufficient for a mid-senior role in this niche domain.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong DevOps and CI/CD practices demonstrated through infrastructure work
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No professional C++ on Windows experience in last 10+ years
Zero demonstrated exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or banking systems
SQL experience listed but no context of SQL Server/Oracle in financial systems
